articles.title: DTE seals $1.6B deal to buy batteries from West Michigan plant amid data center push
articles.summary: DTE Energy has finalized a $1.6 billion agreement to purchase batteries from LG Energy, which operates a plant in West Michigan. This deal is part of DTE's strategy to launch eight battery energy storage systems throughout the state. The initiative is likely driven by the increasing demand for energy, particularly from new data centers.

articles.title: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. stock (US46120E6023): Robotic-surgery leader after latest earnings and grow
articles.summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. maintains its leadership in robotic-assisted surgery following strong Q1 2025 results and strategic investments in growth. The company's business model relies on its da Vinci and Ion platforms, generating revenue from system sales, recurring instrument usage, accessories, and service contracts. They are focused on innovation and global expansion, primarily driven by growing procedure volumes and an increasing installed base of systems.

articles.title: Alcon Inc stock (CH0432492467): eye-care specialist in focus after latest earnings
articles.summary: Alcon Inc. remains a key player in the eye-care sector, attracting investor attention after its latest quarterly earnings and updated 2025 outlook. The company shows growth in surgical and vision care, balancing strong demand for products like cataract surgery equipment and advanced contact lenses with challenges from currency fluctuations and cost inflation. Its significant US market presence and New York Stock Exchange listing make it relevant for US investors, despite its Swiss headquarters.
